   173→        if (result && !sessions.has(result.sessionId)) {
   174→          sessions.set(result.sessionId, result)
   175→        }
   176→      }
   177→    } catch (e) {
   178→      console.error('Failed to read sessions directory:', e)
   179→    }
   180→  }
   181→
   182→  // Sort by most recent first
   183→  const sorted = [...sessions.values()]
   184→  sorted.sort((a, b) => b.lastModified - a.lastModified)
   185→
   186→  return sorted
   187→}
   188→
   189→function discoverOpenCodeSessions(projectPath: string): DiscoveredSession[] {
   190→  const dataDir = resolveOpenCodeDataDir(projectPath)
   191→  const dbPath = join(dataDir, 'opencode.db')
   192→
   193→  if (!existsSync(dbPath)) {
   194→    return []
   195→  }
   196→
   197→  let db: InstanceType<typeof Database> | null = null
   198→  try {
   199→    db = new Database(dbPath, { readonly: true, fileMustExist: true })
   200→    const rows = db.prepare(`
   201→      SELECT id, title, updated_at, created_at, message_count
   202→      FROM sessions
   203→      WHERE parent_session_id IS NULL
   204→      ORDER BY updated_at DESC
   205→    `).all() as Array<{ id: string; title: string | null; updated_at: number; created_at: number; message_count: number }>
   206→
   207→    return rows
   208→      .filter(row => (row.message_count ?? 0) > 0)
   209→      .map(row => {
   210→        const lastModifiedSeconds = row.updated_at || row.created_at || 0
   211→        return {
   212→          sessionId: row.id,
   213→          slug: (row.title && row.title.trim()) || row.id.slice(0, 8),
   214→          lastModified: Number(lastModifiedSeconds) * 1000,
   215→          cwd: projectPath,
   216→          fileSize: 0
   217→        }
   218→      })
   219→  } catch (e) {
   220→    console.error('Failed to read OpenCode sessions:', e)
   221→    return []
   222→  } finally {
   223→    try { db?.close() } catch { /* already errored */ }
   224→  }
   225→}
   226→
   227→export async function discoverSessions(projectPath: string, backend: 'claude' | 'gemini' | 'codex' | 'opencode' | 'aider' = 'claude'): Promise<DiscoveredSession[]> {
   228→  if (backend === 'opencode') {
   229→    return discoverOpenCodeSessions(projectPath)
   230→  }
   231→  return discoverClaudeSessions(projectPath)
   232→}

     2→import { Project, useWorkspaceStore } from '../../stores/workspace.js'
     3→import { SidebarState } from './useSidebarState.js'
     4→import { SidebarProps } from './types.js'
     5→
     6→// Use type assertion for extended electronAPI methods not in the base type
     7→const electronAPI = window.electronAPI as (typeof window.electronAPI) & {
     8→  selectExecutable?: () => Promise<string | null>
     9→  runExecutable?: (executable: string, cwd: string) => Promise<{ success: boolean; error?: string }>
    10→  getCategoryMetaPath?: (categoryName: string) => Promise<string>

    12→}
    13→
    14→export interface SidebarHandlers {
    15→  // Project handlers
    16→  handleSelectExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    17→  handleClearExecutable: (project: Project) => void
    18→  handleRunExecutable: (project: Project) => Promise<void>
    19→
    20→  // Rename handlers
    21→  handleStartRename: (e: React.MouseEvent, project: Project) => void
    22→  handleRenameSubmit: () => void
    23→  handleRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    24→
    25→  // Category handlers
    26→  handleAddCategory: () => void
    27→  handleOpenCategoryAsProject: (categoryName: string) => Promise<void>
    28→  handleOpenAllProjects: () => Promise<void>
    29→  handleStartCategoryRename: (
    30→    category: ReturnType<typeof useWorkspaceStore.getState>['categories'][0]
    31→  ) => void
    32→  handleCategoryRenameSubmit: () => void
    33→  handleCategoryRenameKeyDown: (e: React.KeyboardEvent) => void
    34→  toggleCategoryCollapse: (categoryId: string) => void
    35→
    36→  // Resize handler
    37→  handleMouseDown: (e: React.MouseEvent) => void
    38→
    39→  // Backdrop handler
    40→  handleBackdropClick: () => void
    41→}
    42→
    43→export interface UseSidebarHandlersParams {
    44→  state: SidebarState

    46→  onOpenSession: SidebarProps['onOpenSession']
    47→  isMobile: boolean

    51→export function useSidebarHandlers(params: UseSidebarHandlersParams): SidebarHandlers {
